content:
├── Group_ShapeSliders
│   ├── Row_Mouth      [Label_Mouth]  [Slider_Mouth]  [Text_MouthValue]
│   ├── Row_Neck       [Label_Neck]   [Slider_Neck]   [Text_NeckValue]
│   ├── Row_Shoulder   [Label_Shoulder] [Slider_Shoulder] [Text_ShoulderValue]
│   ├── Row_Belly      [Label_Belly]  [Slider_Belly]  [Text_BellyValue]
│   └── Row_Foot       [Label_Foot]   [Slider_Foot]   [Text_FootValue]
├── Text_ShapeMatch        # 器型匹配度 0~100%

#### Panel_Glaze（釉料配方面板）

```
Panel_Glaze
├── Group_GlazeSliders
│   ├── Row_Kaolin     [Label_Kaolin]  [Slider_Kaolin]  [Text_KaolinValue]
│   ├── Row_Ash        [Label_Ash]     [Slider_Ash]     [Text_AshValue]
│   ├── Row_Copper     [Label_Copper]  [Slider_Copper]  [Text_CopperValue]
│   ├── Row_Iron       [Label_Iron]    [Slider_Iron]    [Text_IronValue]
│   └── Row_Cobalt     [Label_Cobalt]  [Slider_Cobalt]  [Text_CobaltValue]
├── Text_GlazeMatch        # 釉料匹配度 0~100%
└── Btn_ToFiring           # [入窑烧制] → 切换至 Panel_Firing
```
